prestazioni: Engine swap to a **KL-ZE (2.5L V6, 24V, 200hp JDM spec)** with a **Tomei 272° camshaft kit** and **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** for optimized scavenging on the KL-series block, paired with a **GReddy SP2 intercooler** (if forced induction is later added via **Garrett GT2860RS turbo** with a **custom KL-series manifold** from **Full-Race Motorsports**).

Full **KL-ZE-spec internals upgrade** including **JE 8.5:1 forged pistons**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ACL Race Series bearings**, mated to a **Toda Racing lightweight flywheel** and **OS Giken twin-plate clutch** for high-RPM stability (redline extended to **8,500 RPM** via **Apexi Power FC** standalone ECU with **KL-ZE base maps**).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (MX-3-specific valving)** and **Cusco front/rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear)**, paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms** and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts)** for chassis rigidity and rotation control.
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit** (MX-3-specific, bolt-on fenders with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** for KL-ZE engine bay clearance), paired with a **C-West front bumper (JDM-spec)** and **Mazdaspeed rear diffuser** for aggressive aero balance.

**Work Meister S1 3P 16x8 +38 (front) and 16x9 +35 (rear)** wheels with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 205/45/16 (front) and 225/45/16 (rear)** tires, shod with **Project Kics R40 6-pot front and 4-pot rear big brake kit** (330mm rotors) for track-ready stopping power.

**Custom JDM-inspired livery** featuring **Mazda factory Racing Green (paint code 25D)** with **GReddy carbon fiber hood (MX-3-specific cutouts)** and **RE Amemiya side decals**, complemented by **Mazdaspeed OEM-style rear spoiler (carbon fiber)** and **LED taillight conversion (Dapper Lighting MX-3-specific units)** for a retro-modern aesthetic.
